name: Bavarian Sausage Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 Tablespoon Mustard; Prepared (strong Djon or Gulden Type)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the knockwurst into small cubes.
2. Mince the pickles and onion.
3. Mix together the vinegar, mustard (prepared, strong Djon or Gulden Type), and oil.
4. Add salt, pepper, paprika, and sugar to the mixture. Adjust seasonings if desired.
5. Add capers; mix well.
6. Stir in the chopped knockwurst, pickles, and onions.
7. Just before serving, garnish with chopped parsley.
